Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 64 2 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I know one thing for sure now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 64 2 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I was right to believe in you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}It took a while, but I finally got your message.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The resolution in Yukari's heart has awakened a new Persona...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I'll fight for what I believe in.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 40 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}That's what you would've wanted. Right, Dad?[n]{f 1 1}
